overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Shani. Mixed stretches are shaped by Rahu and Ketu and need timing awareness.
yearlyTheme: For those born under Vrushabha Raasi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises a largely favorable period driven by Jupiter's positive transit, especially for those in the education sector and those seeking relief from chronic vascular or paralytic health issues. While the period until May 31, 2026, is excellent for wealth accumulation and social prestige, and the months between June and October offer significant support from influential siblings, caution is advised from October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, as students may face academic pressures and real estate dealings could encounter family disputes. However, Rohini Nakshatra natives may still acquire new vehicles during this lull, and as the year concludes with a return to personal prosperity starting January 24, 2027, the stars further suggest that children born in this Rashi this year are destined to become versatile scholars of the sciences.
opportunities: For those born under Vrushabha Raasi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises a largely favorable period driven by Jupiter's positive transit, especially for those in the education sector and those seeking relief from chronic vascular or paralytic health issues. This year, you will take the lead in organizing and performing grand auspicious events and ceremonies; however, a note of caution is advised for children under the age of 12 who have Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal horoscopes, as they or their paternal relatives may face frequent health challenges during this time.
caution: However, some minor unfavorable results may arise in your personal life, specifically leading to irritations or friction with your spouse. In the final week, the health issues of family members may cause concern; specifically, those suffering from heart-related ailments should be cautious.
studiesCareer: While the period until May 31, 2026, is excellent for wealth accumulation and social prestige, and the months between June and October offer significant support from influential siblings, caution is advised from October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, as students may face academic pressures and real estate dealings could encounter family disputes. This period is especially encouraging for those in the healthcare and medical businesses, while individuals with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts will see significant profits in all their endeavors, including a notable increase in easy or unexpected financial gains.
familyRelationships: While the period until May 31, 2026, is excellent for wealth accumulation and social prestige, and the months between June and October offer significant support from influential siblings, caution is advised from October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, as students may face academic pressures and real estate dealings could encounter family disputes. However, Rohini Nakshatra natives may still acquire new vehicles during this lull, and as the year concludes with a return to personal prosperity starting January 24, 2027, the stars further suggest that children born in this Rashi this year are destined to become versatile scholars of the sciences.
healthWellbeing: This period is especially encouraging for those in the healthcare and medical businesses, while individuals with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts will see significant profits in all their endeavors, including a notable increase in easy or unexpected financial gains. Politically active individuals can expect success in attaining constitutional posts and gaining significant influence within government circles; however, while there is no threat of Elinaati Shani (Sade Sati), parents should note that children under the age of 12 may face frequent minor health irritations, though these will not be life-threatening.
blessing: For those born under Vrushabha Raasi, the planet Ketu will provide mixed results during the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, beginning with mildly favorable outcomes until December 4, 2026. From December 5, 2026, through the remainder of the year, Ketu’s influence shifts significantly to deliver highly auspicious results, specifically fulfilling your heart's desires regarding land, wealth, and vehicles, while also fostering harmonious relations with your siblings.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For those born under Vrushabha Raasi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises a largely favorable period driven by Jupiter's positive transit, especially for those in the education sector and those seeking relief from chronic vascular or paralytic health issues. While the period until May 31, 2026, is excellent for wealth accumulation and social prestige, and the months between June and October offer significant support from influential siblings, caution is advised from October 31, 2026, to January 23, 2027, as students may face academic pressures and real estate dealings could encounter family disputes. However, Rohini Nakshatra natives may still acquire new vehicles during this lull, and as the year concludes with a return to personal prosperity starting January 24, 2027, the stars further suggest that children born in this Rashi this year are destined to become versatile scholars of the sciences.

Throughout the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, Saturn’s favorable transit will bring exceptional results for Vrushabha Raasi natives, fostering a sense of profound patience, self-restraint, and an inclination toward spiritual detachment. This period is especially encouraging for those in the healthcare and medical businesses, while individuals with a strong Saturn in their personal birth charts will see significant profits in all their endeavors, including a notable increase in easy or unexpected financial gains. Politically active individuals can expect success in attaining constitutional posts and gaining significant influence within government circles; however, while there is no threat of Elinaati Shani (Sade Sati), parents should note that children under the age of 12 may face frequent minor health irritations, though these will not be life-threatening.

Under the influence of Rahu in the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, Vrushabha Raasi natives will experience exceptionally positive results, so profound that they are likened to the spiritual merit of bathing in the holy Ganges. This year, you will take the lead in organizing and performing grand auspicious events and ceremonies; however, a note of caution is advised for children under the age of 12 who have Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal horoscopes, as they or their paternal relatives may face frequent health challenges during this time.

For those born under Vrushabha Raasi, the planet Ketu will provide mixed results during the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsaram, beginning with mildly favorable outcomes until December 4, 2026. From December 5, 2026, through the remainder of the year, Ketu’s influence shifts significantly to deliver highly auspicious results, specifically fulfilling your heart's desires regarding land, wealth, and vehicles, while also fostering harmonious relations with your siblings. Overall, with the combined favorable transits of Jupiter, Saturn, Rahu, and Ketu, this year stands as a period of complete planetary support and comprehensive success for Vrushabha Raasi natives.

monthlyHighlights.summary: March 2026 will see the successful realization of your anticipated tasks and goals. There will be excellent encouragement and growth in your professional life, including jobs and business ventures. You will establish new connections with influential people in high-ranking positions. For couples aspiring for children, this month brings success in progeny efforts. However, some minor unfavorable results may arise in your personal life, specifically leading to irritations or friction with your spouse. While financial income remains strong, elderly individuals may suffer from issues related to the right eye.

April 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates that financial matters may cause some slight irritations or minor complications. It is advisable to refrain from making new investments in business ventures, as there is a high probability of significant losses due to speculation. During this month, it is also better to avoid purchasing household appliances. In your professional life, the workload and physical strain will increase, necessitating an improvement in your personal skills and talents. More favorable conditions will begin to emerge after the 18th of the month. You will develop a tendency to act in accordance with moral and ethical principles. Politicians will see success, and you will receive long-awaited good news. Business activities will gradually align with your expectations. It is recommended to reduce any negative or condescending attitudes toward others. Please note that the 2nd, 6th, 8th, 13th, and 17th of this month are not favorable dates.

May 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi brings the expected happiness and harmony in marital life. Efforts for marriage for the unmarried will be successful, particularly for those born under the Mrigasira Nakshatra, whose efforts will culminate in a good matrimonial alliance. Any misunderstandings with your spouse will be resolved this month. Transactions related to the sale of real estate will yield profits. Partnership businesses initiated this month will pave the way for significant growth. Travels undertaken in the third week will be fruitful. However, this month may cause disappointment for the unemployed. In the final week, the health issues of family members may cause concern; specifically, those suffering from heart-related ailments should be cautious. you may have to spend your time and hard-earned money on others' tasks. Between the 22nd and 28th of this month, those serving in the defense sector may face the risk of accidents during the discharge of their duties.

June 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi will be characterized by strong financial inflows and the attainment of expected wealth. You will be successful in recovering long-standing or "stubborn" debts from friends or relatives. For salaried employees, the first and second weeks of this month are particularly encouraging and productive. Completing tasks with the full cooperation of family members will bring significant mental satisfaction. This month also indicates visits to sacred shrines or the opportunity to develop acquaintances with spiritual gurus. Women, especially those born under the Krittika Nakshatra, may face unfounded allegations or blame within their domestic life, alongside an increased burden of family responsibilities. Please be aware that the 10th, 14th, 20th, and 25th of this month are not favorable; there are specific signs of potential job-related setbacks or interruptions during these times. It is strongly advised not to sign any important documents or deeds on these specific dates.

July 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates that past disputes and conflicts will finally be resolved. Financial income is expected to remain moderate during this period. However, there is a sign of loss of mental peace in your personal life due to a betrayal by a trusted person. You may also experience a lack of comfort in your daily routine. On a positive note, you will purchase modern appliances for household needs, and this month is highly favorable for those making efforts toward foreign travel. In the second week, you are likely to hear good news regarding your children. While unfavorable changes may continue in your professional life, you will be able to complete your goals through sheer persistence despite the adverse conditions. This is a time to correct your past mistakes, and you will develop the habit of thinking calmly and steadily. Students will achieve results commensurate with their hard work, and those pursuing medical education will find new opportunities this month. In the final week, you will enjoy the luxury of new jewelry or vehicles, leading to a significant boost in your self-confidence.

August 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates that business activities will perform well, and people from all walks of life will receive their expected financial income. Your siblings may require your help and cooperation during this period. New friendships and acquaintances will be established, though you may find yourself undertaking sudden or unexpected travels. You will likely make changes to your home that align with your personal tastes and interests. This is an excellent time for financial relief, as you will be able to clear pending bank loans and receive favorable judgments in ongoing court cases. In your professional life, meetings with high-ranking officials will prove beneficial. For those who lost their jobs in previous months, it is highly recommended to grab even the smallest opportunity that comes your way now. It is advisable to let go of stubbornness during this time. You will regain the respect and honor within your family that may have been lost previously. However, it is better to keep certain personal matters private and confidential. Job search efforts made between the 7th and 16th of this month are likely to be successful.

September 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi continues to see strong financial income. Any new tasks or projects initiated during this period will yield the expected financial profits and culminate in success. Government employees will earn the appreciation and favor of their superiors. This is an excellent time for the unmarried, as they are likely to find very suitable matrimonial alliances. In the third week, you will organize feasts or entertainment events at home; this is also an ideal time for the purchase of new vehicles. Bank transactions and new agreements or contracts will be successfully concluded during the final week. Women born under Vrushabha Rasi will overcome professional challenges and may successfully begin earning their own income. By the end of the month, you will enjoy the desired comforts in your personal life. You will find yourself regularly looking after the welfare of your relatives and friends, and you will also succeed in building better rapport and harmony with your neighbors.

October 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates a risk of significant health setbacks for a family member, with the period being particularly unfavorable for paternal relatives. You will demonstrate great dedication and fulfill your professional targets through hard work. Financial income is expected to remain moderate. However, there may be a lack of consensus among family members regarding financial matters, and stubbornness could lead to disputes with your own kin. You will come to realize that mental peace is deeply tied to a harmonious home environment, and your physical health may also depend on the atmosphere within the family. With the support of friends, you will be able to meet some of your financial goals. Business activities will continue at a standard pace. Please exercise caution during travels on the 11th, 13th, 18th, and 27th of this month. In the final week, you can expect an increase in expenditures.

November 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates that work pressure and stress from superiors will increase at your workplace. It will be difficult to find time for rest, so it is advisable to share your responsibilities with trusted colleagues or friends. Financial income will remain moderate this month, but you will successfully manage to reduce the excessive expenditures that occurred in the previous month. It is better to postpone matters related to court cases or legal disputes. Those in the money-lending or interest-based business will see an increase in their earnings. After the 15th, students and professionals will feel enthusiastic as new opportunities manifest. However, business owners may face minor irritations and problems, and it is essential to be very careful regarding permits and documentation. This month brings excellent recognition for those in the field of dance, and it is an auspicious time to start earning through performing arts. For the unmarried, this period promises a life partner with a sharp and active intellect.

December 2026 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates that you will receive excellent cooperation from your spouse, aligned perfectly with your personal tastes and interests. The family atmosphere will be filled with complete joy and happiness. In terms of career, however, salaried employees will continue to face a heavy workload and high pressure. Financial income is expected to increase slightly this month. At one point, the affection and support from friends and relatives will bring you great satisfaction. You will find yourself setting higher, more ambitious goals for your life path. Around the middle of the month, brainstorming and exploring new sources of income will prove to be profitable. The final two weeks will yield only average results, and you may experience low physical stamina or fitness. For those who have Rahu in the Kalatra Sthana (7th house) of their personal birth chart, both husband and wife may suffer from significant health issues or lack of energy. It is advisable to avoid taking any major decisions on the 13th, 14th, and 15th of this month.

January 2027 for Vrushabha Rasi brings favorable outcomes regarding matters related to children. Those aspiring for a male child will see their wishes fulfilled, and overall family relationships will improve significantly. Devotion and prayers to Goddess Durga this month will ensure the best possible results in all aspects of life. The professional environment remains encouraging; however, it is advisable not to postpone any important tasks in your official duties. The path for foreign travel efforts will become clear and smooth. You will be in a strong position to fulfill the financial needs of your family members. In the final week, there will be a noticeable reduction in the intensity of problems related to past enmities or long-standing health issues.

February 2027 for Vrushabha Rasi indicates that your health may slightly decline due to pleasure trips or long-distance travels. Ongoing court cases are likely to be resolved in your favor. With the arrival of expected financial gains, you will experience a joyful atmosphere at home. All types of business ventures will perform well during this month. Although the workload will be particularly heavy on the 25th, 26th, and 27th, you will successfully complete your tasks. It is advisable not to blindly trust the words of mediators or middle-men. Due to the full strength of the planet Budha (Mercury) this month, it is an excellent time to start earning through independent, knowledge-based professions. This month is exceptionally favorable for government employees, who may enjoy the benefits of official vehicles or administrative authority (Vaahana Mudradhikara Yogam)..

March 2027 for Vrushabha Rasi presents situations where you must fulfill your duties without being affected by the criticism of others. Financial income is expected to remain moderate. This month is a highly favorable time to begin efforts toward constructing your own house, and the necessary funds for construction will be secured. It is also an opportune period for implementing new experiments or strategies in business. For those with political aspirations, this is a very promising time to attain high-ranking positions. In your professional life, there are clear signs of receiving increased remuneration or bonuses. However, in the final week, there is a possibility of health issues related to the hand or the requirement of a minor surgical procedure.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
